---
title: "Calculate Indicators"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

dat.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "raw")
roi.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "studyarea")
dum.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "dummy")
ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Data

## 0.1 Indicator Data

Load in the wrangled vector data for each indicator. 

```{r}
# Find matching GeoPackage files
objs <- get_bucket(
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  prefix = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data/indicators/"
)

gpkg_files <- paste0(
  "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/",
  sapply(objs, `[[`, "Key")
)

gpkg_files <- gpkg_files[grepl("\\.gpkg$", gpkg_files)]

indicator_tbl <- data.frame(
  file = gpkg_files,
  indicator_id = sub("^ind_(.*)\\.gpkg$", "\\1", basename(gpkg_files))
)

indicator_tbl$vector <- lapply(indicator_tbl$file, vect)

```


## 0.2 Dummy Data

```{r}
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "eccc_reclass_reproj_algn_binary.tif"))
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "gpw_reproj_algn_natseminat_noshrub_masked.tif"))
dum_fut <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "AAFC_LUTS_2020_5-classes.tif"))

# plot(dum_base)
# plot(dum_fut)
```

## 0.2 Census subdivision Data
```{r}
# cen_sub$CDUID is ID column
cen_sub <-  vect(file.path(roi.dir, "census-subdivisions", "lcsd000a25a_e_modelling-extent.shp"))

# plot(cen_sub)

# Census subdivision lookup table 
cen_sub_lut <- terra::values(cen_sub) |>
  dplyr::select(
    CDUID,
    PRUID,
    PRNAME,
    CSDNAME
  )


lut_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  cen_sub_lut,
  lut_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = lut_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/census_subdivision_lookup.csv"
)
```



# Calc indicators

```{r}
# ---- Progress logging setup ----

log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_cen_sub_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
}

log_msg("Starting indicator calculation (per census subdiv)")
log_msg(paste("Number of vectors:", nrow(indicator_tbl)))
log_msg(paste("Number of census subdivs:", nrow(cen_sub)))
```

```{r}
# ---- Sanity checks ----
stopifnot(
  same.crs(dum_base, cen_sub),
  all(sapply(indicator_tbl$vector, function(v) same.crs(dum_base, v)))
)


log_msg("CRS check passed for raster and vectors")

```

```{r}
# ---- Cache census subdiv raster ----
tmp_dir <- "/home/sagemaker-user/WG_Biodiversity/tmp_data"
dir.create(tmp_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

cen_rast_file <- file.path(tmp_dir, "cen_sub_rast.tif")

if (file.exists(cen_rast_file)) {

  cen_rast <- rast(cen_rast_file)
  log_msg("Loaded cached census subdiv raster")

} else {

  cen_rast <- rasterize(
    cen_sub,
    dum_base,
    field = "CDUID",
    background = NA
  )

  writeRaster(
    cen_rast,
    cen_rast_file,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )

  log_msg("census subdiv raster created and saved locally")
}
```



```{r}
terraOptions(cores = parallel::detectCores())

# Progress bar (once, before loop)
pb <- txtProgressBar(
  min = 0,
  max = nrow(indicator_tbl),
  style = 3
)

results <- vector("list", nrow(indicator_tbl))


for (i in seq_len(nrow(indicator_tbl))) {
  id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[i]
  v  <- indicator_tbl$vector[[i]]

    t0 <- Sys.time()
  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %d: started", i))

  res <- tryCatch({

    # Dissolve indicator once
    v_one <- aggregate(v)

    # Rasterize indicator geometry to dummy raster grid
    ind_mask <- rasterize(
      v_one,
      dum_base,
      field = 1,
      background = NA
      )

    # Mask census subdiv raster to indicator footprint
    dum_masked <- mask(dum_base, ind_mask)
    cen_masked <- mask(cen_rast, ind_mask)   
    
    # Zonal sum (single raster pass)
    zonal_tbl <- as.data.frame(
      zonal(dum_masked, cen_masked, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
      )


    colnames(zonal_tbl) <- c("CDUID", "pixel_ones")
    
    zonal_tbl <- zonal_tbl[!is.na(zonal_tbl$CDUID), ]
    
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: %d census subdivs with data; total pixels = %s",
      i,
      nrow(zonal_tbl),
      format(sum(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")
    ))
    
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: pixel range = [%s, %s]",
      i,
      format(min(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones), big.mark = ","),
      format(max(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones), big.mark = ",")
      ))

    zonal_tbl$indicator_id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[i]

    zonal_tbl

  }, error = function(e) {

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: ERROR - %s",
      i, e$message
    ))

    NULL
  })

  results[[i]] <- res

  # Update progress bar
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)

  log_msg(sprintf(
    "Indicator %d: finished in %0.2f minutes",
    i,
    as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "mins"))
  ))
}

close(pb)

log_msg("Tabular indicator calculation completed")
```

```{r}
indicators_census_subdiv_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results)
log_msg(sprintf(
  "Final table created: %d rows, %d indicators",
  nrow(indicators_census_subdiv_df),
  length(unique(indicators_census_subdiv_df$indicator_id))
))
```

```{r}
# Local temp CSV
tmp_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  indicators_census_subdiv_df,
  tmp_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Upload to S3
aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = tmp_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_census_subdiv_pixel_counts.csv"
)

log_msg("Saved indicators_census_subdiv_pixel_counts.csv to S3")
```
